title: Springvale
content:
Roof Restoration Springvale

Does Your Springvale Home Need Expert Roof Repairs? Is the roof of your home looking weathered and worn? Or maybe you need roof and gutter repairs after a storm? Look no further than the expert team at Sandhurst Roofing. We provide expert workmanship and high-quality service with our COLORBOND® steel roofing, gutter repairs, roof repairs and roof restorations to Springvale. Whether you home has a terracotta tiled roof, cement tiled roof, Colorbond or a flat metal roof, we guarantee that we have the experience and the know-how to help with any type of restoration or repair job you need.

Get a Quote!

Sandhurst Roofing – Providing Quality Gutter & Roof Repairs for Over 30 Years

W e began Sandhurst Roofing over 30 years ago, and ever since we’ve continued to deliver premium work and friendly service to the south and eastern suburbs of Melbourne. Whether you live in Springvale, Dandenong or Cranbourne, our team of experts will be on hand to solve your roof issues. Not only that, but our 10-year guarantee will put your mind at ease because we stand behind the products we use and our skilled tradespeople.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Springvale

Guttering is one of the most important components to any roof, they carry water away from the main structure of the house, which prevents mould growth, leaks, rotting and more. We pride ourselves on using only the highest quality products, that’s why your new gutters will be installed using Colorbond Steel. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable materials, this means that not only will they do their job well, but they will last for years to come.

Our team of qualified roofers offer a variety of services that will help get your guttering back to working like new. With the knowledge that comes with over 30 years in the industry, we have the skills required to create a well-engineered solution for your individual guttering issue.

If you’re in need of gutter repairs, or thinking about replacing your current ones, give us a call on 0448 812 800, we will be more than happy to talk with you about your options.

What Our Customers Say

Just wanted to say a massive thank you for all you outstanding work regarding our roof. What a tremendous team you are, professional in every single way, which is extremely rare these days. Right from the start, I knew that your company was the right company to go with due to your professionalism, constant communication and keeping us in the loop every step of the way…We will certainly be highly recommending your company and have already done so.

Kaz Howard & Tony Orchard
★★★★★

Our roof looks amazing, we had over 70 cracked tiles, they replaced those and the roof needed re pointing as well as it was flaking and damaged. Due to weather it took a few weeks and to ensure it looked perfect Matty & the team delayed works but kept us in the loop all the time, but it was worth wait. Our roof looks brand new. They clean up of the site afterwards, ensure you happy with that and nothing is too much trouble. Thank you.

Allison Sheean
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Contact Your Friendly Springvale Roof Repairers Today

A re you unsure about what your roof needs? Our honest and fully registered team of roof tilers and roof plumbers will be happy to have a chat about any of our offered services to get to the root of your issue and offer a solution. Just give us a call on 0448 812 800.

You can also contact us via our email, info@sandhurstroofing.com.au or alternatively, fill in the form below, and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible. It’s time to experience the Sandhurst Roofing difference.
